results.title: Nine Indian fishermen arrested by Sri Lankan Navy; trawler seized
results.description: The Sri Lankan Navy arrested nine Indian fishermen and seized a fishing trawler for allegedly crossing the maritime boundary and fishing illegally in Sri Lankan waters.

results.title: 'For the students. By the students': Alia Bhatt backs CJP-led students' protest
results.description: NEET paper leak: Alia Bhatt has backed the Cockroach Janta Party-led student protest seeking Dharmendra Pradhan’s resignation. Her Instagram post joins Salman Khan and other actors supporting students demanding accountability after the exam controversy.

results.title: McLaren brings new floor and aerodynamic upgrades to Hungarian Grand Prix
results.description: McLaren will introduce a new floor and additional aerodynamic upgrades at this weekend’s Hungarian Grand Prix as it seeks to improve the MCL40’s performance.

results.title: Historic 800-year-old French château near Lyon for sale for €3.8 million
results.description: An 800-year-old French château near Lyon in Isère has gone on the market for €3.8 million. The listed historic estate includes 19 bedrooms, medieval ramparts and potential for tourism and events.

results.title: MK Party Raises Bias Concerns Over Phala Phala Impeachment Committee Evidence Leader Nominations
results.description: CAPE TOWN — Political parties now have until 6 p.m. on Friday to submit additional nominations for the evidence leader of Parliament’s Phala Phala impeachment committee. The extension comes amid growing concerns over the perceived bias of certain nominees tasked with probing the 2020 theft of foreign currency from President Cyril Ramaphosa’s farm. uMkhonto weSizwe [...]

results.title: Ratan Tata's Will Faces Complications Over Share Ownership Dispute
results.description: The execution of Ratan Tata's will has hit a snag due to a dispute over the ownership of 833 Tata Sons shares. This issue has led to an investigation by the Maharashtra charity commissioner, preventing the transfer of 3,368 shares to philanthropic foundations. While the Tata Trust maintains that the original transfer was lawful, the executors are currently unable to proceed until the investigation concludes. This situation not only complicates the transfer of shares but also adds uncertainty to Ratan Tata's substantial estate, valued at approximately Rs 10,000 crore, which includes various personal assets and investments.
